name: PHASE-40 C2 (CREATION carve-out): with NO ambient active project declared (null), a ctx-less write into a NEW project's dir MUST be ALLOWED - the create->activate bootstrap window
_phase40_note: Proves the null carve-out that preserves project creation/bootstrap: when no operation has DECLARED an active project (ambient null) and the ctx carries no active id, a project-targeted write is allowed. This is the window the real createProject runs in - the A.0 trace confirmed createProject calls writeActiveProject(B) BEFORE persistProjectState(B) (create->activate ordering on the real flow, apiServer.js:883-885), and the policy uses the AMBIENT register (not the on-disk active_project.json), so an on-disk active 'A' never denies B's own creation writes. GREEN before and after; guards against the fix breaking bootstrap. Contrast S329 (ambient declared -> cross-project denied).

fixture_files.content: phase-40 creation-carveout fixture - registers phase40_create_b for cleanup
